channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Polkadot grimace: a fragile bounce traps bulls at $1.32, then a looming slide toward sub-$1.00 in 30 days. DOT hovers $1.28 as bears tighten. 💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260421-price-prediction-dot-relief-rally-to-132-before-30 #dot #crypto #polkadot
